title: [v5.0] podman machine start: make checkExclusiveActiveVM check race free
body:

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *openshift-cherrypick-robot* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v5.0/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Cockpit tests failed for commit 59512272b35cb1061025361ec7ca3b468e80a9cf. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

There's been lots of cockpit-podman rawhide failures today, something got merged that breaks user containers in rawhide with podman-next. I saw the same thing in #22048 and #22043. Too late for me today to investigate, will do tomorrow morning. But it's *not* https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2269485 , I already pushed a workaround for that.
I reported the user podman lockup in #22052
